actionCalls.description: Calls the AgentGetReportTypeColumns Apex action to retrieve valid column API names and labels for a specific report type from the Analytics REST API.
actionCalls.name: Get_Report_Type_Columns
actionCalls.label: Get Report Type Columns

Flow.interviewLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: Get Report Type Columns {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: WSM - ALF - Agent: Get Report Type Columns

variables.description: Number of columns returned. Use to confirm results were found before building the report.
variables.name: columnCount

variables.description: JSON array of available columns for the report type. Each element has "apiName" (use as column values in Create Report) and "label" (human-readable name). Example: [{"apiName":"CASE_NUMBER","label":"Case Number"},{"apiName":"STATUS","label":"Status"}]
variables.name: columnsJson

variables.description: JSON array of default column API names Salesforce uses for this report type. These are always valid and safe to use. Example: ["CASE_NUMBER","SUBJECT","STATUS","PRIORITY"]
variables.name: defaultColumnsJson

variables.description: Error details when success is false. Common causes: invalid report type name, session timeout, or insufficient permissions.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: The report type API name to inspect. Example: CaseList, Opportunity, OrderList. Obtain this from List Report Types if you do not know the exact value.
variables.name: reportType

variables.description: True if columns were retrieved successfully, false if an error occurred. Check this before using columnsJson.
variables.name: success

variables.description: Optional keyword to filter columns by label or API name. Case-insensitive. Example: "Amount" returns only columns containing "Amount". Leave blank to return all columns.
variables.name: filterKeyword

variables.description: Maximum number of columns to return. Defaults to all columns if not provided. Use lower values to reduce response size.
variables.name: maxResults
